title: Source-Frozen Projection, Time-Readout, and Closure-Control Kernels in SPARC Galaxies
description: Reproducibility package for the Paper 9 projection-enriched candidate/control audit. The package contains manuscript source, rendered PDF, arXiv source package, smoke tests, and source-frozen artifacts for projection, time-readout, and closure-control kernel diagnostics. It is a candidate/control audit package, not population validation and not evidence for a new gravitational law.
notes: The one-command reproduction path does not perform live online acquisition. Optional source-acquisition/provenance scripts and their online dependencies are documented in README.md.
